searchProcess.robotsOrAccessNotes: medschool.umich.edu and medicine.umich.edu both returned HTTP 403 to WebFetch (anti-bot protection, likely Cloudflare-style). The lane clearly exists per the search engine's prior index — but direct verbatim retrieval is blocked this turn. NOT bypassed. Queued for manual retry in p101_manual_retry_log.csv.

candidateFindings.pageTitle: Visiting MD Students | University of Michigan Medical School
candidateFindings.shortQuote: Source page returned HTTP 403 to WebFetch; no verbatim quote captured this turn. Search engine prior index reports VSLO domestic network May-April cycle with up to 8 weeks max — these reports are LEADS not evidence.

negativeEvidence.weakNegativeEvidence: WebFetch could not retrieve verbatim content from medschool.umich.edu nor medicine.umich.edu sub-paths (HTTP 403). Search-result snippets indicate (a) VSLO Domestic Network lane for final-year US students, (b) international lane restricted to schools with institutional agreement with UMMS (~30-35 international students/year), (c) max 8 weeks, (d) TOEFL required for international, (e) completed clerkships in Surgery/IM/OBGYN/Peds required for international — but these are search-summary signals not direct evidence and must not be quoted as source language.

nextAction: Manual retry queued. Options for next sprint: (a) try alternative User-Agent in pdf-extract-pdf-text.ts curl wrapper (current wrapper uses Mozilla UA which may be insufficient against medschool.umich.edu's defenses); (b) request the user fetch the pages from a browser and paste content; (c) check Wayback Machine for an archived snapshot of the hub. Until then, NO confirmed classification for UMMS — the search-summary leads do not satisfy the verbatim-quote-or-no-claim rule.
plainEnglishSummary: Michigan Medicine's visiting-students pages returned HTTP 403 to automated fetch attempts on both medschool.umich.edu and medicine.umich.edu/dept/globalreach. The lane clearly exists per Google's prior index of the page (final-year US via VSLO; international via institutional agreement; ~30-35 international students/year; max 8 weeks; TOEFL + 4 core clerkships required for international). But none of those signals are direct verbatim source quotes — they are search-summary snippets. Per the core quality law (verbatim quote or no claim), this packet is classified BOT_BLOCKED_MANUAL_RETRY rather than fabricated as INTERNATIONAL_STUDENT_CONFIRMED. Will need a different retrieval method next sprint.
driftCheck: This advanced national USCE discovery because Michigan was correctly identified as BOT_BLOCKED rather than overclaimed from search-summary signals. The negative-evidence shape was preserved honestly.
